title: jluquette/luquette_ALS_FTD_ALZ_indels: Ambient RNA correction
author: jluquette
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Add Kisong's scripts to run Cellbender, which tries to correct for ambient RNA contamination. This contamination is especially pronounced in single  cell  RNA-seq (rather than single  nucleus  RNA-seq, because of the nuclear sorting).
steps_raw: Add Kisong's scripts to run Cellbender, which tries to correct for ambient RNA contamination. This contamination is especially pronounced in single  cell  RNA-seq (rather than single  nucleus  RNA-seq, because of the nuclear sorting).
